message:
fix(vdbe): dispatch SeekGE/GT/LE/LT by cursor type, not key value type

The VDBE seek opcodes dispatched between table_move_to and index_move_to
based on whether the key register contained a Blob value. This was wrong:
an index cursor (e.g. autoindex) receiving an integer key would call
table_move_to, which tries to parse index cells as table cells, failing
with "table leaf cell has no rowid" or "interior table cell has no rowid".

Fix: dispatch based on cursor.is_table_btree() instead. Table cursors
always use table_move_to (key as integer rowid), index cursors always use
index_move_to (key as record blob bytes).

Also adds a symmetric page-type guard in index_seek_for_insert (matching
the existing one in table_seek_for_insert) for defense-in-depth.

Fixes br#138, br#139, br#140, br#144, br#145.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
